doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The cited “EAJP-2025” protocol and form do not correspond to any known California State Bar institutional issuance and contain implausible unauthorized-practice exemptions.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 99
REASON: This document cites and authorizes powers in a way that does not match any known California State Bar or Legal Services Trust Fund Commission protocol, and the referenced EAJP-2025/EAJP-Form 1A appear invented.
response_turn2:
